# Usage Example:

**Query with Theme and Features:**
> Use mudblazor-generator skill to generate a complete Blazor foundation with MudBlazor Material Design components, themes, icons, and responsive layout.
**带主题和特性的提问：**
> 使用 mudblazor-generator skill，生成完整的 Blazor 基础架构，包含 MudBlazor Material Design 组件、主题、图标和响应式布局。
